title: Gato Plushies
description: A mod adding variants of my mascot as a plushie!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12f5aa990c54f9daab3d83d0c7ceed4fc48660b.png)
_The mod adding a bunch of plushies of my mascot!_
# Trailer

none yet, but heres a gif of one of the plushies spinning

![gato plushie spin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbf43d432988afb53abb2917ef9af9f95b1d37df.gif)

yeah

# Description

Ever wanted a plushie of my YouTube mascot in MINECRAFT?

No? Well I DID!

Introducing the **Gato Plushies** Mod! A mod that adds 10 variants of my mascot, IN PLUSHIE FORM! Unfortunately, this plushie doesn't exist in real life... yet...

THIS MOD EVEN HAS **ADVANCEMENTS**!

## Plushie Variants

**Gato Plushie**

**Angry Gato Plushie**

**Sleepy Gato Plushie**

**Sad Gato Plushie**

**Crying Gato Plushie**

**Wet Gato Plushie**

**Very Wet Gato Plushie**

**Gato Plushie in a Suit**

**Jumbo Gato Plushies**

**Gamer Gato Plushie**

## Items

**Gamer Headset**

Required to craft a Gamer Gato Plushie.

**Dancing Gato**

# end

Yeah thats kind of it. I 100% recommend installing **Just Enough Items** to see the crafting recipes, as some of them are a little annoying

Made using MCreator.
